globalNews.title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
globalNews.summary: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

globalNews.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
globalNews.summary: Iran says it has hit two ships in the Strait of Hormuz as well as targets in Bahrain and Jordan.

globalNews.title: Lebanese army says troops deploying in 'pilot zone' after Israeli withdrawal
globalNews.summary: A US-brokered agreement should see Israeli troops pulling out of a small part of Lebanon occupied during their conflict with Hezbollah.

globalNews.title: Row escalates in Ukraine over army chief's future
globalNews.summary: Protesters are demanding Oleksandr Syrskyi be removed and former defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov reinstated by Friday.

globalNews.title: Dozens hurt in Bologna protests after man dies while being restrained by police
globalNews.summary: Thousands of people took to the streets demanding justice for a Moroccan-born man who died on Sunday.

cryptoNews.title: CoinShares debuts Bitcoin mining ETF in Europe entrance
cryptoNews.summary: The UCITS ETF, CoinShares’ first in Europe, began trading on Deutsche Börse Xetra, tracking a rules-based index of publicly listed BTC miners.

cryptoNews.title: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
cryptoNews.summary: Arcus, built by the dYdX team, adds tokenized stocks and perpetual futures on Robinhood Chain as platforms compete to bring traditional assets onchain.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol on Base
cryptoNews.summary: Morpho Midnight introduces fixed rates and defined maturities alongside Morpho Blue’s variable-rate lending markets.

cryptoNews.title: Tether-backed Twenty One, Strike merger plan scrapped: Bloomberg
cryptoNews.summary: Strike will remain a standalone company after the proposed three-way merger was scrapped, while Twenty One Capital and Elektron continue discussions, Bloomberg reported.

aiNews.title: Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated
aiNews.summary: Deezer said more than 90,000 AI-generated tracks were uploaded daily on the platform in June.

aiNews.title: Gritt exits stealth with $32 million for robots to build solar plants — then, everything else
aiNews.summary: Gritt is coming out of stealth with $34 million and plans to automate the hardest tasks on construction sites.

aiNews.title: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
aiNews.summary: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.

aiNews.title: Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
aiNews.summary: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

aiNews.title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
aiNews.summary: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
